name: cairn
description: Architectural Knowledge Management for AI-Assisted Development — records the WHY behind your code so agents don't 'improve' away deliberate decisions.
author: Trevor Schoeny

hooks.prompt: Check if this project has a .cairn/ directory. If it does NOT exist, this project hasn't been initialized for Cairn yet. Tell the user and offer to run /cairn:init to set up architectural decision tracking. If .cairn/ already exists, do nothing — no message needed.
